Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Due To Plaintiff?S Failure To Appear At Judicial Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Counsel In Support Of Motion For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Heisey of Santana, Vierra & Symonds telephone number 415-777-1308 for Defendant Duncan Dobson.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DUNCAN DOBSON'S Motion For Sanctions Due To Plaintiff?S Failure To Appear At Judicial Arbitration is granted. Defendant is awarded sanctions in the amount of $1,000. Order signed in open Court. Sanctions should be paid within 10-days of service of the order.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/SB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Due To Plaintiff?S Failure To Appear At Judicial Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Counsel In Support Of Motion For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-11-2016 Continued To Jun-10-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Phuy Le, of Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen, Tel. 415.398.5000, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
Mark J. Heisey, of Law Offices of Santana, Tcheng, Vierra & Symonds, Tel. 415.777.1308 ext 16060, appearing for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. Plaintiff's counsel does not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem. DEFENDANT DUNCAN DOBSON Motion For Sanctions Due To Plaintiff's Failure To Appear At Judicial Arbitration is continued to June 10, 2016, at 9:30 a.m., in Department 302, Law & Motion. Judge Pro Tem to prepare report and recommendation. Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Gray; Clerk Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
